sentences.arabic: تَشْهَدُ الْغَابَاتُ فِي الْعَالَمِ ارْتِفَاعًا كَبِيرًا فِي دَرَجَاتِ الْحَرَارَةِ.
sentences.translation: Svjetske šume bilježe značajan porast temperatura.
sentences.translationEn: World forests are experiencing a significant rise in temperatures.

sentences.arabic: يُؤَدِّي هَذَا التَّغَيُّرُ إِلَى جَفَافِ الْأَشْجَارِ وَانْتِشَارِ الْحَرَائِقِ.
sentences.translation: Ova promjena dovodi do isušivanja drveća i širenja požara.
sentences.translationEn: This change leads to trees drying out and the spread of fires.

sentences.arabic: يَقُولُ الْعُلَمَاءُ إِنَّ الْحِفَاظَ عَلَى الْبِيئَةِ هُوَ مَسْؤُولِيَّةُ الْجَمِيعِ.
sentences.translation: Naučnici kažu da je očuvanje okoliša odgovornost svih nas.
sentences.translationEn: Scientists say that preserving the environment is everyone's responsibility.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَلَيْنَا زِرَاعَةُ الْمَزِيدِ مِنَ الْأَشْجَارِ لِحِمَايَةِ كَوْكَبِنَا.
sentences.translation: Moramo saditi više drveća kako bismo zaštitili našu planetu.
sentences.translationEn: We must plant more trees to protect our planet.

sentences.arabic: تَعْمَلُ الْحُكُومَاتُ الْآنَ عَلَى وَضْعِ خُطَطٍ جَدِيدَةٍ لِلْحَدِّ مِنَ التَّلَوُّثِ.
sentences.translation: Vlade sada rade na postavljanju novih planova za smanjenje zagađenja.
sentences.translationEn: Governments are now working on establishing new plans to reduce pollution.
